testcase.name: test_01_verify_rizza_is_honorary_fa

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected honorary_fa, got None assert None == 'honorary_fa' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc106355a780>('license_type') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc106355a780> = {}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_111_family_accounts.py:58: in test_01_verify_rizza_is_honorary_fa assert member.get("license_type") == "honorary_fa", f"Expected honorary_fa, got {member.get('license_type')}" E AssertionError: Expected honorary_fa, got None E assert None == 'honorary_fa' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc106355a780>('license_type') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc106355a780> = {}.get

failure.message: AssertionError: Create habit failed: 422 assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
